command: env PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 uv run --with torch --with av --with safetensors --with timm --with einops --with segmentation-models-pytorch --with numpy python experiments/proxy_score_faithful.py /private/tmp/pact-mine/experiments/postfilter_weights/postfilter_segnet_attack_fixed_ste_h32_int8.pt | tee /private/tmp/pact-mine/proxy_segnet_attack_fixed_ste_h32.log
notes: Launched after segnet_attack_fixed_v2 wrote real fp32/int8 artifacts. The faithful proxy resolved cleanly at 1.84, which is a real transfer but still not enough to beat the promoted 1.73 floor.
